creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Klaus Küchemann from comment #45)

u-boot never starts FreeBSD or its loader.efi
copy in the failing examples (no output from
the bootaa64.efi at all). FreeBSD is not
involved yet at the time of u-boot switching
to attempting a network boot: u-boot is what
is still active.
